svg.content:
<mxfile host="65bd71144e"> <diagram name="power-system" id="power-system-diagram"> <mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="760" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/>
<!-- Drive Power Group --> <mxCell id="g1" value="駆動系電源 (Drive Power)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="30" width="780" height="160" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Control Power Group --> <mxCell id="g2" value="制御系電源 (Control Power)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="250" width="780" height="220" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Drive: Makita Battery --> <mxCell id="d1" value="Makita BL4025
36V (40Vmax)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="80" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Drive: Relay --> <mxCell id="d2" value="OMRON G9EA-1-B
パワーリレー (NO)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fdedec;strokeColor=#e74c3c;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="80" width="200" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Drive: Motors --> <mxCell id="d3" value="RS02 モータ x10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="80" width="160" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Control: Moman Battery --> <mxCell id="c1" value="Moman Power 50 Touch
D-TAP 16.7V" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="300" width="200" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Control: WAGO --> <mxCell id="c2" value="WAGO
ワンタッチコネクタ" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="400" width="200" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Control: Jetson --> <mxCell id="c3" value="Jetson Orin Nano Super" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="300" width="200" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Control: DC-DC --> <mxCell id="c4" value="DC-DC 昇圧
16.7V → 24V" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="400" width="200" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Control: ZBRRA --> <mxCell id="c5" value="Schneider ZBRRA
非常停止スイッチ" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fdedec;strokeColor=#e74c3c;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="400" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Edges: Drive path --> <mxCell id="e1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="d1" target="d2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="d2" target="d3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Edges: Control path --> <mxCell id="e3" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="c1" target="c3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="c1" target="c2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="c2" target="c4" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="c4" target="c5" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Edge: ZBRRA to Relay coil (dashed, cross-group) --> <mxCell id="e7" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;strokeColor=#e74c3c;" parent="1" source="c5" target="d2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Annotation --> <mxCell id="a1" value="フェイルセーフ: 制御電源喪失 → リレー開放 → モータ電源遮断" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;fontColor=#e74c3c;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="510" width="440" height="30" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

g.text: フェイルセーフ: 制御電源喪失 → リレー開放 → モータ電源遮断
